description: You are a Business Continuity Planner preparing an employee training presentation on the organization's Business Continuity Plan (BCP). A 6-slide draft is open in LibreOffice Impress at /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/bcp_training.odp. Expand this into a training deck of at least 12 slides. The presentation must include an emergency response process flowchart (one slide with at least 8 connected shapes), at least one chart (such as an RTO/RPO comparison), and speaker notes on at least 8 slides. Export the final presentation as a PDF to /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/bcp_training.pdf. Login: username=ga, password=password123.

metadata.occupation: Emergency Management Directors / Business Continuity Planners
metadata.standards_reference: ISO 22301:2019, FEMA Business Continuity Planning Guide
